steps.title: Untrusted workflow_call chain reaches privileged reusable workflow sink
upgrade_steps: Create a dedicated benign fixture branch and isolate all validation commits.
Trigger workflow_call path from controlled untrusted entry (fork PR/comment) and capture downstream job trace.
Capture OIDC token issuance event and decode claims (sub/aud/job_workflow_ref) without exfiltrating secrets.
safe_fixture_notes: Use only owned fixtures and non-production repos/roles for active validation.
Never execute destructive write actions; keep tests reversible and auditable.
stop_conditions: Stop if fixture change leaks real credentials or sensitive production data.
Stop if workflow execution path diverges from expected untrusted trigger chain.
validation_checks: Confirm untrusted trigger reaches intended workflow/job path.
Decode OIDC claims and compare against trust policy expectations (sub/aud/job_workflow_ref).
